title: spigelia anthelmia
intro: Spigelia anthelmia, also known as Indian pink, is a flowering plant native to North America. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat various gastrointestinal issues such as stomach cramps, diarrhea, and colic, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Spigelia anthelmia include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of Spigelia anthelmia can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used in combination with other herbs to promote digestive health and relaxation.
